name: NZXT H6 Flow Compact Dual-Chamber Mid-Tower Airflow Computer Case - Matte Black - Panoramic Glass Panels - 3x F120Q Airflow 120mm Fans - Headset Audio Jacl - 2x USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C (CC-H61FB-01)

description: Compact dual-chamber mid-tower case with panoramic glass and excellent airflow for high-performance builds.
